title: Huawei OptiXstar EN8145B7Ns, XGS-PON ONT Gateway, WiFi 7
description: The Huawei OptiXstar EN8145B7Ns is an intelligent ONT router utilizing XGS-PON and Wi-Fi 7 technologies. It provides ultra-broadband access, high performance, and wide coverage. The device features 1x 2.5Gbit Ethernet port, 3x 1Gbit Ethernet ports, a POTS port, and a USB port. For the PON network, there is 1x SC/APC connector located on the back, with the option to store excess length of the optical patch cord. Thanks to its high performance and features such as parental control, IPTV & SIP… Fast access to the wireless network is ensured by Wi-Fi 7 in the 2.4 & 5GHz bands with support for 2x2 MU-MIMO , reaching maximum modulation speeds of 688 + 2882 Mbps . It also supports WPA3 , roaming, and beamforming With the USB 2.0 port, you can easily turn your router into a home multimedia center. The device supports FTP, DLNA, and SAMBA protocols, including the option to share printers Device Power adapter 12V / 1.5A
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax, 802.11be MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2880 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 688 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] 5 Optics Transmission speed 9,95 / 9,95 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1260 up to 1280 / 1575 up to 1580 Transfer type XGS-PON Polishing type APC Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 28 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 1G/2.5Gbps + (3) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Max. power consumption [W] 18 Power via connector/terminal 12V / 1,5A
